description: Deploying a Bicep/ARM template without what-if and silently deleting a resource.
body: Failure mode: a template is deployed without running what-if, and because it omits a resource the template owns (or uses complete mode), Azure deletes a live resource. Detection signals: activity log shows an unexpected Delete, the resource vanishes after deployment, and complete deployment mode was used. Do not deploy templates blindly, especially in complete mode. Safer fallback: always run az deployment what-if first, review Delete/Modify entries on stateful resources, deploy in incremental mode, and gate any previewed production deletion behind human approval.
